resources.string: Can\'t change brightness in live view
Can\'t change contrast in live view
Can\'t change color filter in live view
Can\'t change flashlight in frozen view
Can\'t change horizontal scroll in live view
Can\'t change vertical scroll in live view

Open Magnifier is a privacy-first, open source magnifier with Optical Character Recognition (OCR for Latin, Chinese, Devanagari, Japanese), Language Translation (Bengali, Chinese, English, French, Hindi, Indonesian, Japanese, Marathi, Portuguese, Spanish, Tagalog, Vietnamese), speech output, and text captioning

Magnify -> OCR -> Translate -> Speak w/captions

User can flip between live view (camera) and freeze frame (image)

What's New

* 1.7 Use volume keys to control speaking. Volume up = repeat current item, volume down = speak next item. double volume up = speak previous item. Added Tagalog and Vietnamese
* 1.6 Show recognized or translated text as it is spoken.
* 1.5 Share image. Process images from other apps likes Photos or Messages
* 1.4 Translate speak image. Supports Bengali, Chinese, English, French, Hindi, Indonesian, Japanese, Marathi, Portuguese, Spanish. Requires Google Play.
* 1.3 Speak Image. Added support for Chinese, Devanagari, and Japanese
* 1.2 Speak Image. Speak recognized text in the freeze frame
* 1.1 Flashlight Support. Enabled flashlight in live view

Quick Tutorial

* Toggle between live and freeze frame: Single tap the screen or press Space on the keyboard
* Adjust zoom: Pinch the screen with two finger or press Z on the keyboard
* Scroll (freeze frame): Swipe the screen or press the arrow keys on the keyboard
* Display help: Long press the screen or press H on the keyboard
* Speak image: Speak recognized text. Latin, Chinese, Devanagari, and Japanese characters only. Disabled by default. Enable the Speak Image in Preferences. Uses system locale for speech
* Translation: Speak Image must be enabled. Set source and destination languages in Preferences. Translation models are downloaded before first use. Translation occurs on device

Touchscreen Gestures (live view)

* Single tap = switch to freeze frame
* Two finger pinch = change zoom level
* Double tap = opens the preference dialog
* Long press = opens the help dialog)

 Touchscreen Gesutres (freeze frame)

* Single tap = switch to live view
* Two finger pinch = change zoom level
* Double tap = zoom in or out
* Long press = stop speech
* Swipe or drag = scroll/pan
* Double tap and hold and drag = change zoom level (one finger version)
* Two finger pinch and hold and drag = change zoom level and scroll/pan

Keyboard Controls

* Space bar toggles between (live view and freeze frame)
* z changes zoom levels (live view and freeze frame)

* Arrow keys scrolls image (freeze frame only)
* b changes brightness (freeze frame only)
* c changes contrast (freeze frame only)
* f changes color filters (freeze frame only)
* h shows help
* l changes flashlight (live view only)
* r changes rotation (freeze frame only)
* s changes speech
* x changes left/right scroll distance (freeze frame only)
* y changes up/down scroll distance (freeze frame only)
* v shows version number

Troubleshooting

* Speak Image: If the device does not speak, check that the feature is enabled, check the volume level, make sure the TextToSpeech language is downloaded for the system locale, make sure the image is clear and readable

About

Open Magnifier Copyright © 2026 Mark Tamura

This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.

Open Source Libraries

Subsampling Scale Image View Copyright © 2018 Dave Morrissey

Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Google ML Kit Text Recognition Copyright © 2026 Google LLC. All rights reserved.

Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Links

https://uglydog.io/magnifier/

Disclaimers

This app utilizes Google ML Kit Text Recognition to convert images into text. While we strive for high accuracy, optical character recognition (OCR) technology is inherently subject to limitations. The accuracy of the text generated depends heavily on external factors, including image quality, lighting conditions, camera focus, font styles, and handwritten text. Open Magnifier does not guarantee 100\% accuracy, completeness, or reliability of the recognized text. Users should always manually review and verify the extracted text before relying on it for any critical, financial, legal, or medical purposes. Under no circumstances shall the developers of Open Magnifier be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, losses, or errors arising from the use of, or the inability to use, the OCR feature. This includes, but is not limited to, data loss, misinterpretation of text, or transcription errors.

This service may contain translations powered by Google. Google disclaims all warranties related to the translations, express or implied, including any warranties of accuracy, reliability, and any implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose and noninfringement.
